calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-01-2022 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-17-2021 Set For Trial On Dec-05-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Taylor Daviss Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-25-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. RHONDA L. WOO, Esq. of Howard Rome Martin & Ridley LLP (Tel: 650-365-7713) for defendant Peninsula Corridor Joint Powers Board;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PENINSULA CORRIDOR JOINT POWERS BOARD's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Taylor Davis' Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents, And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for defendant (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion is Granted. No opposition filed. Objections are waived. Plaintiff Davis to serve verified responses to (1) Form Interrogatories-General, Set One, (2) Special Interrogatories, Set One, and (3) Request for Production of Documents, Set One within 10 days. Plaintiff Davis also to produce all responsive documents within 10 days. Defendant's request for sanctions is Denied for failure to comply with Code of Civil Procedure section 2023.040.

Court to sign proposed order submitted by counsel for defendant.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Nov-17-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2021 Set For Trial On Jul-05-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Sep-17-2021 Continued To Nov-17-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
